title: Genshin Nature
description: Enemies, wildlife, plants, structures and more from Genshin Impact, in Minecraft
body:
Have any suggestion? Want to report a bug? We have a Discord server! You can join and ask anything you want!


Introduction

 

Genshin Nature got cancelled in 2022. If you want to see better polished projects with passion put into them, please click here.

 

This mod aims to add every single creature and feature you can find in the wilds of the world of Genshin Impact. You can find structures around the world where you can find creatures and items from Genshin Impact, you can find enemies and wildlife around the world, make your own food plates with ingredients you can find around the world, make wishes, buy new items from shops, use artifacts and upgrade them, and much, much more. This mod adds enemies, wildlife, structures, plants, bosses, food, items, and much more from Genshin Impact.

 

CLICK HERE IF YOU WANNA KNOW WHERE DOES ANYTHING SPAWN IN: https://genshin-nature.fandom.com/wiki/Checkspawns

 

There's an official Technic modpack you can play if you want! You can check it out at https://www.technicpack.net/modpack/genshin-im-pack-t.1916884

 

We have official carrd page! Know about it at: https://the-genshin-mineverse.carrd.co/

 

I highly recommend using Just Enough Items.

 

FAQ

Q: Why would I play this instead of the game itself?

A: You can play with people anywhere in the world without having to change accounts or server, and it's not such a hassle as it is in Genshin itself. You also have creative freedom, you can build anything you want, you can go into creative mode and play with anything you want from the mod, just the way you want. You can create custom maps, explore special locations and obtain event items, being able to 100% this without time limited events or spending money, and in overall, having more freedom for doing anything you want. You can also add this mod to a modpack if you want a more interesting experience.

 

Q: Where can I report bugs?

A: You can report bugs in our Discord server. There's a channel called ''bug-reports'' that lets you report any bug you find.

 

Q: Can I add this mod to a modpack? / Can I upload Youtube videos using the mod?

A: I'm totally cool with people adding this mod to their modpack, I'd love to see people playing the mod on Youtube, Twitch... and you can freely share this mod to anyone as long as you don't say you made it, because you didn't! You can talk about what you see in this, you can share screenshots if you want... Feel completely free to talk about it and enjoy it the way you want!

 

Q: Where do the creatures spawn?

A: Each creature spawn in different biomes or structures, and some are more specific than others, aswell as having multiple rarities. You can check spawns here: https://genshin-nature.fandom.com/wiki/Checkspawns

 

Q: Why does my game crash when I start it with the mod?

A: Probably because you're using the wrong java. Make sure you're using Java Offline 64-bits: https://www.java.com/en/download/manual.jsp. If this doesn't work, please join our Discord.

 

Credits

MiHoYo: Creator of Genshin Impact.

fapdos: Owner of the mod. Director of everything. Main texturer, main modeller.

PaiTiller: Modeller. Made Azhdaha, Lawachurls and Bathysmal Vishaps.

Royling: Modeller. Made the Shadowy Husks. Sprite artist. Made Glazed lily, Qingxin, googol chair, otogi rakushi square stool, smooth stone bench, smooth wooden bench, clear blue afternoon, pine dining chair, pine-backed tea chair, red pine wood round stool, square yumemiru stool, & teahouse round stool: pain point reduction.

Angelic: Internal manager. Also made the pinecone texture and Geo Hypostasis' textures.

Pilly: Builder. Made hypostases' structure, Azhdaha's structure, Golden Wolflord's structure, Underground structures, redesigned Hilichurl camps, Miasmic Tumor tree, and Great Snowboar King structure.

KuriPa Official: Modeller. Guoba plushie

Youdidn'tseeanything: Sprite artist. Made the texture of Sakura Bloom, Horsetail, Snapdragon, Matsutake, Violetgrass, Calla lily, Cecilia, Naku weed, Silk flower & Sweet flower.

HuKakao (@HuTaoFullSimp on Twitter): Modeller. Made Baal's human model.

scp_owl: Modeller and texturer. Made the plushies base model.

mikusabbath: Texturer. Made the textures of most plushies, and also made the texture of the realm coin.

Jawz1023: Modeller. Made the model of the Geovishap Hatchling.

Outcasts_studios: Modeller. Made the model of the Ruin Guard.

Rekfy: Modeller. Made weapons.

Dreyse: Modeller. Made weapons.

LeKebabGeek: Modeller. Made weapons.

SkyFantasyWorld: Modeller. Made weapons.

I_BB_I: Modeller. Made the Ruin Serpent model and angelfishes.

Starstorms21: Modeller. Made the model of Arama.

Jooji: Modeller. Made the Jadeplume Terrorshroom model.

Mod available in Spanish, Chinese (Traditional), Chinese (Simplified), Japanese and Latin Spanish.
